LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING, AND ORDERED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS JOE MORALES AND VALLEY HOME REALTY'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE IS GRANTED, BASED ON THE INFORMATION PROVIDED TO THE COURT AT HEARING THAT PARTY DEFENDANT ZILLOW IS NOW DISMISSED. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR REASONABLE EXPENSES AND ATTORNEY FEES IS DENIED. DEFENSE COUNSEL SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. THE PROPOSED ORDER SHOULD RECITE THE FACTS OF THE CASE AS IT NOW STANDS REGARDING THE PARTY DEFENDANT ZILLOW NOW BEING DISMISSED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2015 Continued To Feb-10-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendants Valley Home Realty And Joe Morales Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue, Request For Reasonable Expenses And Attorney Fees Pursuant To Ccp 396b
Off Calendar Oct-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. CRAIG MURDOCK, ESQ., Tel No. 415-235-5114 specially appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. CATHERINE A. SALAH, ESQ. of Gordon & Rees LLP, Tel No. 415-986-5900 appearing for Defendants Joe Morales and Valley Home Realty.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court vacated its tentative ruling, and ordered as follows: DEFENDANTS JOE MORALES AND VALLEY HOME REALTY'S Motion To Transfer Venue is GRANTED, based on the information provided to the Court at hearing that party defendant Zillow is now dismissed. Defendant's Request For Reasonable Expenses And Attorney Fees is DENIED. Defense counsel shall prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. The proposed order should recite the facts of the case as it now stands regarding the party defendant Zillow now being dismissed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Defendants Valley Home Realty And Joe Morales Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue, Request For Reasonable Expenses And Attorney Fees Pursuant To Ccp 396b
Off Calendar Oct-19-2015 Continued To Oct-22-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS JOE MORALES AND VALLEY HOME REALTY'S Motion To Transfer Venue, Request For Reasonable Expenses And Attorney Fees Pursuant To Ccp 396b is continued to October 22, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion, on the Court's own motion. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
